Add more vertices before switching this.en: Add more vertices before switching this graphic to a closed style.
Add more vertices before switching this.zh: 在将此图形切换为闭合样式之前添加更多顶点。

Advanced high-zoom tuning for nearshore.en: Advanced high-zoom tuning for nearshore fill and scenario contour exit thresholds.
Advanced high-zoom tuning for nearshore.zh: 用于近岸色带与场景等高线退出阈值的高缩放调优。

All matching presets moved to Releasable.en: All matching presets moved to Releasable Countries.
All matching presets moved to Releasable.zh: 所有匹配预设都已移动到“可释放国家”中。

Allow or ignore macro open-ocean regions.en: Allow or ignore macro open-ocean regions during hover, click, and paint.
Allow or ignore macro open-ocean regions.zh: 在悬停、点击和涂绘时允许或忽略宏观外海区域。

Already using this boundary variant..zh: 已经在使用这个边界变体。

Apply Core Territory or presets in Terri.en: Apply Core Territory or presets in Territories & Presets
Apply Core Territory or presets in Terri.zh: 在“领土与预设”中应用核心领土或预设

Apply Visual Color to Core Territory.en: Apply Visual Color to Core Territory
Apply Visual Color to Core Territory.zh: 将视觉颜色应用到核心领土

Apply a scenario first, then enable the.en: Apply a scenario first, then enable the overlay when you want a derived frontline view.
Apply a scenario first, then enable the.zh: 先应用一个剧本，然后在需要衍生前线视图时启用该覆盖层。

Apply a subtle overlay texture for a vin.en: Apply a subtle overlay texture for a vintage map feel.
Apply a subtle overlay texture for a vin.zh: 添加一层微妙的纹理覆盖，营造复古地图质感。

Apply a symbol, then return to the map t.en: Apply a symbol, then return to the map to continue placement or edit the selected counter live.
Apply a symbol, then return to the map t.zh: 应用符号，然后返回地图以继续放置或实时编辑所选计数器。

Apply this releasable's political owners.en: Apply this releasable's political ownership and make it active.
Apply this releasable's political owners.zh: 应用这个可释放国的政治归属并将其设为激活所属。

Attached counters will fall back to prov.en: Attached counters will fall back to province or free anchors.
Attached counters will fall back to prov.zh: 附属计数器将回退到省份锚点或自由锚点。

Audit and manifest stay read-only here s.en: Audit and manifest stay read-only here so tuning and source truth do not get mixed.
Audit and manifest stay read-only here s.zh: 审计和清单在这里保持只读状态，因此调整和源事实不会混淆。

Available only in the TNO 1962 scenario..en: Available only in the TNO 1962 scenario.
Available only in the TNO 1962 scenario..zh: 仅在 TNO 1962 剧本中可用。

Available when Experimental Bathymetry i.en: Available when Experimental Bathymetry is enabled.
Available when Experimental Bathymetry i.zh: 启用“实验性测深”后可用。

Available when Experimental Ocean Styles.en: Available when Experimental Ocean Styles is enabled.
Available when Experimental Ocean Styles.zh: 启用“实验性海洋样式”后可用。

Balanced keeps terrain visible while sta.en: Balanced keeps terrain visible while staying cleaner over political fills.
Balanced keeps terrain visible while sta.zh: 均衡模式会保留地貌存在感，同时尽量避免把政治底色弄脏。

Baseline unavailable for this family.zh: 这个家族没有可用基线

Bathymetry Contours emphasizes contour l.en: Bathymetry Contours emphasizes contour lines while bands stay in the background.
Bathymetry Contours emphasizes contour l.zh: 测深等高线预设强调轮廓线，色带退到背景层。

Bathymetry Soft emphasizes depth bands w.en: Bathymetry Soft emphasizes depth bands while keeping contours subtle.
Bathymetry Soft emphasizes depth bands w.zh: 柔和测深预设强调深度色带，等高线仅作辅助。

Boundary variant could not be selected..en: Boundary variant could not be selected.

Browse symbols, tune combat state, and p.en: Browse symbols, tune combat state, and preview the selected counter in one place.
Browse symbols, tune combat state, and p.zh: 浏览符号、调整战斗状态并在一处预览选定的计数器。

Browse the full palette library for manu.en: Browse the full palette library for manual work and palette reference.
Browse the full palette library for manu.zh: 浏览完整颜色库，用于手动取色和调色参考。

Brush On · Shift+Drag to pan.zh: 笔刷开启 · 按住 Shift 拖动画布

Check rendering state, debug views, and.en: Check rendering state, debug views, and project diagnostics when something looks off.
Check rendering state, debug views, and.zh: 当画面异常时，检查渲染状态、调试视图和项目诊断。

Choose a country above to edit its color.en: Choose a country above to edit its color, active owner state, groups, and presets.
Choose a country above to edit its color.zh: 在上方选择一个国家，以编辑其颜色、当前主权状态、分组和预设。

Choose a country above to inspect its id.en: Choose a country above to set or clear the active owner.
Choose a country above to inspect its id.zh: 在上方选择一个国家，以设置或取消当前主权。

Choose a country above to inspect territ.en: Choose a country above to inspect territories, presets, and releasables.
Choose a country above to inspect territ.zh: 在上方选择一个国家，以查看其领土、预设和可释放国家。

Choose a country above, then use Active.en: Choose a country above, then use Active Owner and the Territories & Presets panel.
Choose a country above, then use Active.zh: 先在上方选择一个国家，然后使用“激活所属”和“领土与预设”面板。

Choose a country above, then use Set Act.en: Choose a country above, then use Set Active and the Territories & Presets panel.
Choose a country above, then use Set Act.zh: 请先在上方选择国家，再使用“设为主权”和“领土与预设”面板。

Choose a country, water region, or speci.en: Choose a country, water region, or special region.
Choose a country, water region, or speci.zh: 选择国家、水域或特殊区域。

Choose a line type below or from the bot.en: Choose a line type below or from the bottom command bar to begin drawing.
Choose a line type below or from the bot.zh: 在下方或底部命令栏中选择线型以开始绘制。

Choose a restrained map treatment first,.en: Choose a restrained map treatment first, then tune how many point markers and labels are allowed to surface.
Choose a restrained map treatment first,.zh: 先选一种克制的地图表现方式，再调整允许显示的点标记和标签数量。

Choose an active owner before changing p.en: Choose an active owner before changing political ownership or borders.
Choose an active owner before changing p.zh: 更改政治归属或动态边界前，请先选择激活所属。

Choose an active owner before changing p.en: Choose an active owner before changing political ownership.
Choose an active owner before changing p.zh: 更改政治归属前，请先选择激活所属。

Clear Core Territory Visual Overrides.zh: 清除核心领土视觉覆盖

Clear Owned Region Visual Overrides.zh: 清除已拥有区域的视觉覆盖

Clear owner assignment from selected fea.en: Clear owner assignment from selected features

Click a drained basin or exposure zone o.en: Click a drained basin or exposure zone on the map, or choose one from the list.
Click a drained basin or exposure zone o.zh: 点击地图上的排水盆地或裸露区，或从列表中选择。

Click a region to start painting, or use.en: Click a region to start painting, or use Auto-Fill to color all countries
Click a region to start painting, or use.zh: 点击区域开始上色，或使用自动填充为所有国家着色

Click a sea, lake, or strait on the map,.en: Click a sea, lake, or strait on the map, or choose one from the list.
Click a sea, lake, or strait on the map,.zh: 点击地图上的海域、湖泊或海峡，或从列表中选择。

Click countries to paint. Use the dock b.en: Click countries to paint. Use the dock below the map for quick tools and the left panel for deeper controls.
Click countries to paint. Use the dock b.zh: 点击国家进行绘制。使用地图下方的工具栏快速操作，左侧面板进行详细设置。

Click map to add vertices, double-click.en: Click map to add vertices, double-click to finish.
Click map to add vertices, double-click.zh: 单击地图添加顶点，双击完成。

Click the map to place vertices. Double-.en: Click the map to place vertices. Double-click or press Finish to commit the line.
Click the map to place vertices. Double-.zh: 单击地图以放置折点。双击或按“完成”以提交该行。

Click the map to place vertices. Double-.en: Click the map to place vertices. Double-click or press Finish to commit the operational line.
Click the map to place vertices. Double-.zh: 单击地图放置顶点。双击或按“完成”以提交作战线。

Clipboard API unavailable. The preview t.en: Clipboard API unavailable. The preview text is selected for manual copy.
Clipboard API unavailable. The preview t.zh: 剪贴板 API 不可用，已选中预览文本，方便手动复制。

Clipboard unavailable. Preset IDs were l.en: Clipboard unavailable. Preset IDs were logged to the console.
Clipboard unavailable. Preset IDs were l.zh: 剪贴板不可用。预设 ID 已记录到控制台。

Clipboard write failed. The preview text.en: Clipboard write failed. The preview text is selected for manual copy.
Clipboard write failed. The preview text.zh: 写入剪贴板失败，已选中预览文本，方便手动复制。

Collapse development dock.zh: 折叠开发工作区停靠栏

Continue only if you are ready to discar.en: Continue only if you are ready to discard the current working state or have already exported it.
Continue only if you are ready to discar.zh: 只有在你准备放弃当前工作状态，或已经先导出项目时，才继续。

Controls how many city markers can appea.en: Controls how many city markers can appear per viewport at mid/high zoom.
Controls how many city markers can appea.zh: 控制在中/高缩放时每个视口可以显示多少个城市标记。

Controls how many labels can appear per.en: Controls how many labels can appear per viewport at mid/high zoom.
Controls how many labels can appear per.zh: 控制在中高缩放级别下每个视口可显示的标签数量。

Controls how many labels can appear per.en: Controls how many labels can appear per viewport once cities are already eligible to render.
Controls how many labels can appear per.zh: 当城市已经满足显示条件后，控制每个视口里最多显示多少个标签。

Controls how many point markers can appe.en: Controls how many point markers can appear across the current viewport before labels are considered.
Controls how many point markers can appe.zh: 控制当前视口里最多显示多少个点标记，之后才会考虑标签。

Controls label count only. It does not c.en: Controls label count only. It does not change point density.
Controls label count only. It does not c.zh: 仅控制标签计数。它不会改变点密度。

Copied {count} region entries to the cli.en: Copied {count} region entries to the clipboard.
Copied {count} region entries to the cli.zh: 已复制 {count} 条地块记录到剪贴板。

Copy the selected feature's tag into the.en: Copy the selected feature's tag into the owner input
Copy the selected feature's tag into the.zh: 将所选地块的标签填入归属输入框

Core territory already matches current o.en: Core territory already matches current ownership.
Core territory already matches current o.zh: 核心领土已经与当前所有权相匹配。

Counters should read like map pieces fir.en: Counters should read like map pieces first. Keep only unit, nation, echelon, and label in the fast path.
Counters should read like map pieces fir.zh: 计数器应首先像地图棋子一样易读。在快速路径中只保留单位、国家、梯队和标签。

Current map does not include this action.en: Current map does not include this action's detail features. Load detail topology and try again.
Current map does not include this action.zh: 当前地图不包含此操作的详细特征。加载详细拓扑并重试。

Current map does not include this preset.en: Current map does not include this preset's detail features. Load detail topology and try again.
Current map does not include this preset.zh: 当前地图不包括该预设的详细功能。加载详细拓扑并重试。

Current tool, paint mode, and map action.en: Current tool, paint mode, and map actions
Current tool, paint mode, and map action.zh: 当前工具、绘制模式与地图操作

Delete the selected special region?.zh: 删除当前选中的特殊区域吗？

Derived frontlines stay optional and pro.en: Derived frontlines stay optional and project-local. Enable them only when you want a conflict view.
Derived frontlines stay optional and pro.zh: 派生前线保持为可选且仅限当前项目。只有在需要冲突视图时再启用。

Detail topology not fully loaded; scenar.en: Detail topology not fully loaded; scenario is shown in coarse mode.
Detail topology not fully loaded; scenar.zh: 详细拓扑未完全加载；场景以粗略模式显示。

Detailed baseline not defined for this f.en: Detailed baseline not defined for this family
Detailed baseline not defined for this f.zh: 未为此系列定义详细基线

Detailed interactions are still loading..en: Detailed interactions are still loading. Pan and zoom remain available.
Detailed interactions are still loading..zh: 详细交互仍在加载中，当前仍可平移和缩放。

Development tools take over the center d.en: Development tools take over the center dock while enabled.
Development tools take over the center d.zh: 启用后，开发工具会接管中间快捷栏。

Display / Aggregation / Labels / Coverag.zh: 显示/聚合/标签/覆盖/数据

Drag rows to define the future draw orde.en: Drag rows to define the future draw order. Only the road family is live right now, so the rest stay as structural placeholders.
Drag rows to define the future draw orde.zh: 拖动行来定义未来的绘制顺序。目前只有道路系列处于活动状态，因此其余部分仍作为结构占位符。

Drag white handles to move vertices, cli.en: Drag white handles to move vertices, click midpoint pips to insert, then remove the selected vertex if needed.
Drag white handles to move vertices, cli.zh: 拖动白色手柄以移动顶点，单击中点以插入，然后根据需要删除选定的顶点。

Drawing in progress: click map to add ve.en: Drawing in progress: click map to add vertices, double-click to finish.
Drawing in progress: click map to add ve.zh: 绘图进行中：点击地图添加顶点，双击完成。

Each entry now shows nation, unit preset.en: Each entry now shows nation, unit preset, echelon, and renderer at a glance.
Each entry now shows nation, unit preset.zh: 现在，每个条目都一目了然地显示国家、单位预设、梯队和渲染器。

Enable Experimental Bathymetry to unlock.en: Enable Experimental Bathymetry to unlock data-driven depth presets.
Enable Experimental Bathymetry to unlock.zh: 启用“实验性测深”后才能使用数据驱动的深度预设。

Enable Experimental Ocean Styles to unlo.en: Enable Experimental Ocean Styles to unlock advanced ocean textures.
Enable Experimental Ocean Styles to unlo.zh: 启用“实验性海洋样式”后才能使用高级海洋纹理。

Enable bathymetry and wave presets for t.en: Enable bathymetry and wave presets for testing. May reduce pan and zoom performance.
Enable bathymetry and wave presets for t.zh: 启用测深与波纹预设以供测试，可能降低平移和缩放性能。

Enable data-driven bathymetry presets fo.en: Enable data-driven bathymetry presets for testing. May reduce pan and zoom performance.
Enable data-driven bathymetry presets fo.zh: 启用数据驱动的测深预设以供测试，可能降低平移和缩放性能。

Enable derived frontline overlays and st.en: Enable derived frontline overlays and strategic workspace tools for conflict views.
Enable derived frontline overlays and st.zh: 启用衍生前线叠加层和战略工作区工具以查看冲突态势。

Enter owner tag (e.g. GER, FRA, BRA).en: Enter owner tag (e.g. GER, FRA, BRA)

Export ownership data to a downloadable.en: Export ownership data to a downloadable JSON file
Export ownership data to a downloadable.zh: 将归属数据导出为可下载的 JSON 文件

Export the visible map as a PNG or JPG s.en: Export the visible map as a PNG or JPG snapshot.
Export the visible map as a PNG or JPG s.zh: 将可见地图导出为 PNG 或 JPG 快照。

Failed to load the HOI4 unit icon librar.en: Failed to load the HOI4 unit icon library.
Failed to load the HOI4 unit icon librar.zh: 无法加载 HOI4 单位图标库。

Fine-tune colors and label size once the.en: Fine-tune colors and label size once the preset and density feel close.
Fine-tune colors and label size once the.zh: 当预设和密度差不多合适时，再微调颜色和标签大小。

Five muted presets tuned for political m.en: Five muted presets tuned for political maps, atlas views, and historical overlays.
Five muted presets tuned for political m.zh: 五套偏克制的预设，适合政治地图、图集视图和历史覆盖层。

Flat Blue keeps the ocean fill clean wit.en: Flat Blue keeps the ocean fill clean with no bathymetry overlay.
Flat Blue keeps the ocean fill clean wit.zh: 纯蓝模式仅保留干净的海洋底色，不叠加测深效果。

Frontline rendering is disabled until yo.en: Frontline rendering is disabled until you explicitly enable it for this project.
Frontline rendering is disabled until yo.zh: 在你为此项目显式启用前，前线渲染处于禁用状态。

Game renderer keeps the lighter counter.en: Game renderer keeps the lighter counter style and uses a short internal code or abbreviation.
Game renderer keeps the lighter counter.zh: 游戏渲染器保留更简洁的计数器样式，并使用简短的内部代码或缩写。

Game renderer uses short codes like HQ o.en: Game renderer uses short codes like HQ or ARM. MILSTD expects a SIDC string.
Game renderer uses short codes like HQ o.zh: 游戏渲染器使用 HQ 或 ARM 等短代码。 MILSTD 需要一个 SIDC 字符串。

Historical transfer already matches curr.en: Historical transfer already matches current ownership.
Historical transfer already matches curr.zh: 历史转让已经与当前所有权相匹配。

Hover a region or click one to inspect l.en: Hover a region or click one to inspect live debug metadata.
Hover a region or click one to inspect l.zh: 悬停或点击地块以查看实时调试信息。

Inspect countries, active owners, and di.en: Inspect countries, active owners, and direct color overrides.
Inspect countries, active owners, and di.zh: 检查国家、当前活跃归属方和直接颜色覆盖。

Inspect critical checks, blockers, and s.en: Inspect critical checks, blockers, and source quality for the active scenario.
Inspect critical checks, blockers, and s.zh: 查看当前剧本的关键检查、阻塞项与来源质量。

Inspect scenario-only basins, exposure z.en: Inspect scenario-only basins, exposure zones, and their visual overrides.
Inspect scenario-only basins, exposure z.zh: 检查剧本专用盆地、暴露区及其视觉覆盖。

Inspect seas, lakes, straits, and direct.en: Inspect seas, lakes, straits, and direct water color overrides.
Inspect seas, lakes, straits, and direct.zh: 检查海洋、湖泊、海峡及其直接水体颜色覆盖。

Inspect territories, presets, releasable.en: Inspect territories, presets, releasables, and scenario ownership actions for the selected country.
Inspect territories, presets, releasable.zh: 检查所选国家的领土、预设、可释放国家和剧本归属操作。

Invalid project file. Please select a va.en: Invalid project file. Please select a valid map_project.json.
Invalid project file. Please select a va.zh: 项目文件无效，请选择有效的 map_project.json。

Japan transport workbench carrier.zh: 日本运输工作台搬运车

Keep a working reference visible while y.en: Keep a working reference visible while you line up opacity, scale, and offsets.
Keep a working reference visible while y.zh: 在排列不透明度、比例和偏移时，保持工作参考可见。

Keep the line restrained by default, the.en: Keep the line restrained by default, then opt into labels only when the theater needs annotation.
Keep the line restrained by default, the.zh: 默认情况下保持线条受限制，然后仅在剧院需要注释时才选择添加标签。

Keep the main visibility controls togeth.en: Keep the main visibility controls together so opacity, labels, and capital emphasis read as one layer.
Keep the main visibility controls togeth.zh: 把主要可见性控制放在一起，让不透明度、标签和首都强调作为同一层来调。

Key countries first, then A-Z.zh: 重点国家优先，其余按字母排序

Key scenario countries first. Releasable.en: Key scenario countries first. Releasables appear under parent countries.
Key scenario countries first. Releasable.zh: 重要剧本国家优先，可释放国家显示在母国下方。

Linked to the current ocean fill color..en: Linked to the current ocean fill color.
Linked to the current ocean fill color..zh: 已关联当前海洋填充色。

Live UTC sync updates once per minute..en: Live UTC sync updates once per minute.
Live UTC sync updates once per minute..zh: 实时 UTC 同步每分钟更新一次。

Load a bundled historical setup and rese.en: Load a bundled historical setup and reset to its baseline.
Load a bundled historical setup and rese.zh: 加载内置历史设定，并可重置回其基线。

Load a supported family to inspect live.en: Load a supported family to inspect live parameters, preview controls, and map application rules.
Load a supported family to inspect live.zh: 加载一个已接入的家族后，就能查看实时参数、预览控件和地图应用规则。

Loading HOI4 unit icon library....zh: 正在加载钢铁雄心4单位图标库...

Loading the base map and TNO 1962 assets.en: Loading the base map and TNO 1962 assets before interaction unlocks.
Loading the base map and TNO 1962 assets.zh: 正在加载基础地图和 TNO 1962 资源，完成前暂不开放交互。

MILSTD uses the browser-loaded milsymbol.en: MILSTD uses the browser-loaded milsymbol renderer. Paste a full SIDC for the symbol body.
MILSTD uses the browser-loaded milsymbol.zh: MILSTD 使用浏览器加载的 milsymbol 渲染器。粘贴符号主体的完整 SIDC。

Macro ocean regions are currently includ.en: Macro ocean regions are currently included in hover, click, and paint.
Macro ocean regions are currently includ.zh: 当前开放海洋大区会参与悬停、点击和涂色。

Major Low-Relief Cutoff (m).zh: 主等高线低起伏截止高度（米）

Manage project-level legend entries and.en: Manage project-level legend entries and working map references.
Manage project-level legend entries and.zh: 管理项目级图例条目和当前工作地图参考。

Manifest and audit stay read-only here s.en: Manifest and audit stay read-only here so control tuning and source truth do not get mixed.
Manifest and audit stay read-only here s.zh: 这里的 manifest 和 audit 保持只读，避免把控件调参与事实源混在一起。

Map cleared. Undo is available from hist.en: Map cleared. Undo is available from history.
Map cleared. Undo is available from hist.zh: 地图已清空。可通过历史记录撤销。

Minor Low-Relief Cutoff (m).zh: 次等高线低起伏截止高度（米）

No HOI4 icons match the current filter..en: No HOI4 icons match the current filter.
No HOI4 icons match the current filter..zh: 没有钢铁雄心 4 图标与当前过滤器匹配。

No frontline control split in current sc.en: No frontline control split in current scenario.
No frontline control split in current sc.zh: 当前情况下没有前线控制分裂。

No owned regions were recolored..zh: 没有已拥有区域被重新着色。

No owner scope is available for this fea.en: No owner scope is available for this feature.
No owner scope is available for this fea.zh: 这个地块没有可用的所属范围。

No palette colors match the current sear.en: No palette colors match the current search.
No palette colors match the current sear.zh: 没有颜色与当前搜索匹配。

No parent group is available for this fe.en: No parent group is available for this feature.
No parent group is available for this fe.zh: 这个地块没有可用的父级分组。

No selected regions in the development s.en: No selected regions in the development selection.
No selected regions in the development s.zh: 开发多选中没有已选地块。

No selected regions to copy..zh: 没有可复制的已选地块。

No supported countries in current datase.en: No supported countries in current dataset.
No supported countries in current datase.zh: 当前数据集中没有受支持的国家。

No symbols match the current filter..en: No symbols match the current filter.
No symbols match the current filter..zh: 没有符号与当前过滤器匹配。

No visual overrides to clear..zh: 没有可清除的视觉覆盖。

Once the family schema is confirmed, thi.en: Once the family schema is confirmed, this side will host parameter groups, preview toggles, and map application controls.
Once the family schema is confirmed, thi.zh: 一旦族架构得到确认，这一侧将托管参数组、预览切换和地图应用程序控件。

Open reference tools, export utilities,.en: Open reference tools, export utilities, language toggle, and development workspace access.
Open reference tools, export utilities,.zh: 打开参考工具、导出功能、语言切换和开发工作区入口。

Open the guide, reference tools, and exp.en: Open the guide, reference tools, and export tools from one stable support area.
Open the guide, reference tools, and exp.zh: 从一个稳定的支持区域打开指南、参考工具和导出工具。

Operation graphics and unit counters sta.en: Operation graphics and unit counters stay in the same frontline workspace and remain project-local.
Operation graphics and unit counters sta.zh: 行动图形和单位计数器保留在同一前线工作区内，并且仅保存在当前项目中。

Operation graphics and unit counters sta.en: Operation graphics and unit counters stay project-local.
Operation graphics and unit counters sta.zh: 行动图形和单位计数器仅保存在当前项目中。

Overlay fallback active; editing remains.en: Overlay fallback active; editing remains available.
Overlay fallback active; editing remains.zh: 覆盖层回退已启用，但仍可继续编辑。

Paint Owned Regions With Country Color.en: Paint Owned Regions With Country Color
Paint Owned Regions With Country Color.zh: 用国家颜色重绘已拥有区域

Paint regions to generate a legend..en: Paint regions to generate a legend.
Paint regions to generate a legend..zh: 为区域上色以生成图例。

Paint special regions to create an overr.en: Paint special regions to create an override list.
Paint special regions to create an overr.zh: 给特殊区域上色后，会在此生成覆盖列表。

Paint water regions to create an overrid.en: Paint water regions to create an override list.
Paint water regions to create an overrid.zh: 绘制水域以创建覆盖列表。

Political Clean keeps only the clearest.en: Political Clean keeps only the clearest landform cues over political fills.
Political Clean keeps only the clearest.zh: 政治优先模式只保留最清晰的地貌结构提示，尽量不干扰国家底色。

Political ownership editing already targ.en: Political ownership editing already targets this releasable.
Political ownership editing already targ.zh: 政治归属编辑已经指向这个可释放国。

Political ownership editing now targets.en: Political ownership editing now targets the selected country.
Political ownership editing now targets.zh: 政治归属编辑现在会作用于所选国家。

Political ownership editing now targets.en: Political ownership editing now targets this releasable.
Political ownership editing now targets.zh: 政治归属编辑现在会作用于这个可释放国。

Population / City Boost (Modern only).zh: 人口/城市增长（仅限现代）

Population Boost Strength (Modern only).zh: 人口增长强度（仅限现代）

Preset IDs copied to clipboard..zh: 预设 ID 已复制到剪贴板。

Preset actions assign regions to the act.en: Preset actions assign regions to the active owner.
Preset actions assign regions to the act.zh: 这些操作会将区域分配给当前激活的主权国家。

Preset actions fill regions using the cu.en: Preset actions fill regions using the current selected color.
Preset actions fill regions using the cu.zh: 这些操作会使用当前选中的颜色填充区域。

Project import cancelled because the sav.en: Project import cancelled because the saved scenario baseline does not match the current assets.
Project import cancelled because the sav.zh: 由于保存的剧本基线与当前资源不匹配，项目导入已取消。

Rebuild political borders based on curre.en: Rebuild political borders based on current ownership
Rebuild political borders based on curre.zh: 根据当前归属重建政治边界

Recent scenario tag colors.zh: 最近使用的剧本标签颜色

Reference palettes stay available here w.en: Reference palettes stay available here without crowding the primary editing panels.
Reference palettes stay available here w.zh: 参考调色板会保留在这里，不会挤占主要编辑面板。

Reset all country colors and clear visua.en: Reset all country colors and clear visual overrides?
Reset all country colors and clear visua.zh: 重置所有国家颜色并清除视觉覆盖吗？

Review imported Hearts of Iron IV counte.en: Review imported Hearts of Iron IV counter icons. This library is read-only for now.
Review imported Hearts of Iron IV counte.zh: 查看导入的钢铁雄心 IV 计数器图标。该库目前是只读的。

Review the current paint mode, then appl.en: Scenario Actions below change political ownership first. Open Visual Adjustments only for color-only edits.
Review the current paint mode, then appl.zh: 下方的场景操作会优先修改政治归属。只有在需要纯颜色调整时才打开视觉调整。

Road and rail are the only Japan familie.en: Road and rail are the only Japan families with detailed controls right now. This family keeps only its reserved shell.
Road and rail are the only Japan familie.zh: 公路和铁路是日本目前唯一拥有详细控制的家庭。这个家族只保留了保留的外壳。

Runtime metadata is only available on lo.en: Runtime metadata is only available on localhost.
Runtime metadata is only available on lo.zh: 运行时元数据仅在 localhost 下可用。

Runtime metadata is only available on th.en: Runtime metadata is only available on the local dev server.
Runtime metadata is only available on th.zh: 运行时元数据仅在本地开发服务器上可用。

Runtime metadata not available yet..zh: 运行时元数据暂不可用。

Save or load your map state as a project.en: Save or load your map state as a project file.
Save or load your map state as a project.zh: 将当前地图状态保存或加载为项目文件。

Saved palette could not be restored. Kee.en: Saved palette could not be restored. Keeping the current palette.
Saved palette could not be restored. Kee.zh: 无法恢复保存的调色板。保留当前调色板。

Scenario Actions below change political.en: Scenario Actions below change political ownership first. Open Visual Adjustments only for color-only edits.
Scenario Actions below change political.zh: 下方的场景操作会优先修改政治归属。只有在需要纯颜色调整时才打开视觉调整。

Scenario Actions change political owners.en: Scenario Actions change political ownership and dynamic borders. Use Color Only for color-only edits.
Scenario Actions change political owners.zh: “剧本操作”会改变政治归属和动态边界。只调整视觉颜色时请使用“仅颜色”。

Scenario Actions change political owners.en: Scenario Actions change political ownership and dynamic borders. Use Visual Adjustments for color-only edits.
Scenario Actions change political owners.zh: 场景操作会改变政治归属和动态边界。纯颜色调整请使用视觉调整。

Scenario Locale Editor.zh: 剧本地名本地化编辑器

Scenario controls are locked until the p.en: Scenario controls are locked until the page reloads.
Scenario controls are locked until the p.zh: 场景控件将被锁定，直到页面重新加载。

Scenario loaded. 1) Select a country 2).en: Scenario loaded. 1) Select a country 2) Choose an active owner 3) Use Activate or Scenario Actions.
Scenario loaded. 1) Select a country 2).zh: 场景已加载。1）选择国家 2）选择激活所属 3）使用激活或场景操作。

Scenario loaded. Expand the parent count.en: Scenario loaded. Expand the parent country and use Activate to apply releasable territory.
Scenario loaded. Expand the parent count.zh: 场景已加载。展开母国并使用“激活”来应用可释放国领土。

Scenario relief overlays are currently v.en: Scenario relief overlays are currently visible. Cached relief stays visible during pan and zoom, then redraws exactly after the view settles.
Scenario relief overlays are currently v.zh: 当前剧本的地形覆盖层处于可见状态。平移和缩放期间会继续显示缓存纹理，并在视图稳定后进行精确重绘。

Scenario runtime overlays were degraded..en: Scenario runtime overlays were degraded. Editing remains available.
Scenario runtime overlays were degraded..zh: 场景运行时覆盖层已降级，但仍可继续编辑。

Scenario special regions are currently v.en: Scenario special regions are currently visible and interactive.
Scenario special regions are currently v.zh: 当前剧本特殊区域可见且可交互。

Scenario state is inconsistent. Reload t.en: Scenario state is inconsistent. Reload the page before continuing.
Scenario state is inconsistent. Reload t.zh: 场景状态不一致。在继续之前重新加载页面。

Search HOI4 sprite names, labels, keywor.en: Search HOI4 sprite names, labels, keywords...
Search HOI4 sprite names, labels, keywor.zh: 搜索钢铁雄心 4 精灵名称、标签、关键字...

Search basin, shelf, or exposure....zh: 搜索盆地、陆棚或裸露区...

Search country, ISO-2, or source tag....en: Search country, ISO-2, or source tag...
Search country, ISO-2, or source tag....zh: 搜索国家、ISO-2 或来源 tag...

Search internal presets, symbols, keywor.zh: 搜索内部预设、符号、关键字...

Search the internal counter catalog, the.en: Search the internal counter catalog, then apply a preset back into the editor.
Search the internal counter catalog, the.zh: 搜索内部计数器目录，然后将预设应用回编辑器。

Select a country in Inspector.zh: 在国家检查器中选择国家

Select a country to edit.zh: 选择一个国家开始编辑

Select a country to inspect.zh: 选择一个国家进行查看

Select a country to inspect territories,.en: Select a country to inspect territories, presets, and releasables.
Select a country to inspect territories,.zh: 选择一个国家以查看其领土、预设和可释放国家。

Select a line to drag vertices, click mi.en: Select a line to drag vertices, click midpoint pips to insert points, or remove the selected vertex.
Select a line to drag vertices, click mi.zh: 选择一条线来拖动顶点，单击中点来插入点，或删除选定的顶点。

Select a line to edit its geometry and s.en: Select a line to edit its geometry and style, or start a new drawing from the controls above.
Select a line to edit its geometry and s.zh: 选择一条线来编辑其几何形状和样式，或从上面的控件开始新绘图。

Select a special region to inspect.en: Select a special region to inspect
Select a special region to inspect.zh: 选择一个特殊区域进行查看

Select a water region to inspect.en: Select a water region to inspect
Select a water region to inspect.zh: 选择一个水域地块进行查看

Select or hover a land feature first..en: Select or hover a land feature first.
Select or hover a land feature first..zh: 请先选择或悬停一个陆地地块。

Selected line can be restyled, relabeled.en: Selected line can be restyled, relabeled, or deleted. Use the map to compose new lines.
Selected line can be restyled, relabeled.zh: 可重新设置所选线条的样式、标签或删除它。使用地图来绘制新线条。

Set Active first to assign sovereignty..en: Choose an active owner before changing political ownership or borders.
Set Active first to assign sovereignty..zh: 更改政治归属或动态边界前，请先选择激活所属。

Set Active for sovereignty actions.en: Use an active owner for political actions
Set Active for sovereignty actions.zh: 进行政治操作时使用激活所属

Set the owner tag for all selected featu.en: Set the owner tag for all selected features
Set the owner tag for all selected featu.zh: 为所有选中地块设置归属标签

Short code (e.g. HQ / ARM / INF).zh: 短代码（例如 HQ / ARM / INF）

Single-click: one subdivision | Double-c.en: Single-click: one subdivision | Double-click: country batch
Single-click: one subdivision | Double-c.zh: 单击：单个地块 | 双击：按国家批量
单击：单个子区域 | 双击：父级区域

Single-click: one subdivision | Double-c.en: Single-click: one subdivision | Double-click: parent batch
Single-click: one subdivision | Double-c.zh: 单击：单个地块 | 双击：按上一级批量

Single-click: one subdivision | Double-c.en: Single-click: one subdivision | Double-click: province batch
Single-click: one subdivision | Double-c.zh: 单击：单个地块 | 双击：按省级批量

Sovereignty painting will now assign reg.en: Sovereignty painting will now assign regions to the selected releasable country.
Sovereignty painting will now assign reg.zh: 后续主权绘制将把区域分配给当前选中的可释放国家。

Switch to Fill or Eraser before running.en: Switch to Fill or Eraser before running a batch action.
Switch to Fill or Eraser before running.zh: 运行批量操作前，请先切换到填充或橡皮擦。

Terrain Rich pushes the atlas and contou.en: Terrain Rich pushes the atlas and contour layer for the strongest relief read.
Terrain Rich pushes the atlas and contou.zh: 地貌优先模式会强化图集和等高线，让地形起伏最明显。

The control deck now binds the new displ.en: The control deck now binds the new display schema on the right side while the left column stays contextual.
The control deck now binds the new displ.zh: 控制面板现在将新的显示模式绑定在右侧，而左列保持上下文状态。

The saved project was created against a.en: The saved project was created against a different scenario baseline. Continue only if you are comfortable loading it against current assets.
The saved project was created against a.zh: 该保存项目基于不同的剧本基线创建。只有在你接受按当前资源加载它时，才继续。

These actions only change visual color..en: These actions only change visual color. Ownership, controllers, and dynamic borders stay unchanged.
These actions only change visual color..zh: 这些操作只会改变视觉颜色。归属、控制方和动态边界保持不变。

These actions reuse the current tool mod.en: These actions reuse the current tool mode and selected color or owner.
These actions reuse the current tool mod.zh: 这些操作会复用当前工具模式以及选中的颜色或所属。

These are separate from political frontl.en: These are separate from political frontlines and act as your single-line battle planning layer.
These are separate from political frontl.zh: 这些线条独立于政治前线，用作你的单线作战规划层。

This family has not exposed extra manife.en: This family has not exposed extra manifest or audit cards in the current shell.
This family has not exposed extra manife.zh: 该系列尚未在当前 shell 中公开额外的清单或审核卡。

This only removes the selected project-l.en: This only removes the selected project-local strategic line.
This only removes the selected project-l.zh: 这只会移除当前项目中的所选战略线。

This project is currently deriving front.en: This project is currently deriving frontlines from scenario control boundaries.
This project is currently deriving front.zh: 当前项目正在根据剧本控制边界生成前线。

This removes current paint overrides and.en: This removes current paint overrides and, in political mode, restores ownership to its baseline. You can undo the clear from history.
This removes current paint overrides and.zh: 这会移除当前绘制覆盖；在政治模式下，还会将归属恢复到其基线。你可以通过历史记录撤销清空。

This removes manual color changes from t.en: This removes manual color changes from the current map. You can undo the reset from the toast that follows.
This removes manual color changes from t.zh: 这会移除当前地图中的手动颜色修改。你可以通过随后出现的提示撤销这次重置。

This removes the selected manual zone fr.en: This removes the selected manual zone from the current project. You can undo the deletion from history.
This removes the selected manual zone fr.zh: 这会从当前项目中移除所选手动区域。你可以通过历史记录撤销删除。

This removes the selected project-local.en: This removes the selected project-local counter from the map.
This removes the selected project-local.zh: 这会从地图中移除当前项目中的所选计数器。

This tab is reserved so the right-side d.en: This tab is reserved so the right-side deck keeps one stable structure across families.
This tab is reserved so the right-side d.zh: 该选项卡被保留，以便右侧甲板在整个家庭中保持一个稳定的结构。

Toggle Atlantropa-style scenario regions.en: Toggle Atlantropa-style scenario regions without affecting the base map.
Toggle Atlantropa-style scenario regions.zh: 切换 Atlantropa 风格的剧本区域而不影响基础地图。

Toggle legal ownership vs frontline cont.en: Toggle legal ownership vs frontline control.
Toggle legal ownership vs frontline cont.zh: 切换合法所有权与一线控制权。

Toggle shoreline, basin contour, and tex.en: Toggle shoreline, basin contour, and texture overlays for the active scenario.
Toggle shoreline, basin contour, and tex.zh: 切换活动场景的海岸线、盆地轮廓和纹理叠加。

Turn it on when you want to derive confl.en: Turn it on when you want to derive conflict lines from the active scenario.
Turn it on when you want to derive confl.zh: 当你想从当前剧本派生冲突线时再打开它。

Unable to export the map snapshot..en: Unable to export the map snapshot.

Unable to read the selected file..en: Unable to read the selected file.

Use Activate Releasable or Reapply Core.en: Use Activate Releasable or Reapply Core Territory in Scenario Actions.
Use Activate Releasable or Reapply Core.zh: 请在 Scenario Actions 中使用“激活可释放国”或“重新应用核心领土”。

Use Activate or Scenario Actions for own.en: Use Activate or Scenario Actions for ownership changes
Use Activate or Scenario Actions for own.zh: 使用“激活”或“剧本操作”进行归属变更

Use Country Color for Visual Actions.en: Use Country Color for Visual Actions
Use Country Color for Visual Actions.zh: 使用国家颜色进行视觉操作

Use an active owner for political action.en: Use an active owner for political actions
Use an active owner for political action.zh: 进行政治操作时使用激活所属

Use diagnostics to inspect geometry and.en: Use diagnostics to inspect geometry and artifact behavior.
Use diagnostics to inspect geometry and.zh: 使用诊断视图检查几何与异常行为。

Use short intent lines and quiet caption.en: Use short intent lines and quiet captions so arrows support the frontline instead of overpowering it.
Use short intent lines and quiet caption.zh: 使用简短的意图线和低调标签，让箭头辅助前线而不是压过前线。

Use the bottom command bar for fast entr.en: Use the bottom command bar for fast entry, or start drawing here for the selected line type.
Use the bottom command bar for fast entr.zh: 可使用底部命令栏快速开始，或在此为所选线型开始绘制。

Use the center board to sort the seven t.en: Use the center board to sort the seven transport families. Left stays as context only, while the right deck owns all tuning.
Use the center board to sort the seven t.zh: 使用中心板对七个运输系列进行排序。左侧仅作为上下文，而右侧面板则拥有所有调整。

Use the gear button for the full counter.en: Use the gear button for the full counter editor.
Use the gear button for the full counter.zh: 使用完整计数器编辑器的齿轮按钮。

Use this guide inside the support area s.en: Use this guide inside the support area so the shell stays quiet while the next step stays readable.
Use this guide inside the support area s.zh: 在支持区域内使用本指南，以便 shell 保持安静，同时下一步保持可读。

Use this panel to adjust the current fam.en: Use this panel to adjust the current family without changing the lens column context.
Use this panel to adjust the current fam.zh: 用这个面板调整当前家族，同时保持透镜列的上下文不变。

When off, macro ocean regions are ignore.en: When off, macro ocean regions are ignored for hover, click, and paint.
When off, macro ocean regions are ignore.zh: 关闭后，开放海洋大区将不再响应悬停、点击和涂色。

When off, scenario special regions are h.en: When off, scenario special regions are hidden and ignore hover, click, and paint.
When off, scenario special regions are h.zh: 关闭后，剧本特殊区域会被隐藏，并忽略悬停、点击和涂色。

When off, shoreline, basin contour, and.en: When off, shoreline, basin contour, and texture overlays are hidden for the active scenario.
When off, shoreline, basin contour, and.zh: 关闭后，当前剧本的海岸线、盆地等高线和纹理覆盖层将被隐藏。

You have unsaved changes. Loading a proj.en: You have unsaved changes. Loading a project will replace the current map.
You have unsaved changes. Loading a proj.zh: 你有未保存的更改。加载项目会覆盖当前地图。

Zoom percentage must be between 100% and.en: Zoom percentage must be between 100% and 5000%.
Zoom percentage must be between 100% and.zh: 缩放百分比必须在 100% 到 5000% 之间。

Zoom percentage must be between 35% and.en: Zoom percentage must be between 35% and 5000%.
Zoom percentage must be between 35% and.zh: 缩放百分比必须介于 35% 到 5000% 之间。

presets moved to Releasable Countries..zh: 个预设已移动到“可释放国家”中。

Allow macro open-ocean regions to receiv.en: Allow macro open-ocean regions to receive paint, eraser, and eyedropper actions.
Allow macro open-ocean regions to receiv.zh: 允许对宏观开放海洋区域使用上色、橡皮和吸管操作。

Apply Current Color To Scope.zh: 将当前颜色应用到范围

Macro ocean regions are currently availa.en: Macro ocean regions are currently available in the inspector and map picking.
Macro ocean regions are currently availa.zh: 当前可在检视器选择和地图拾取中使用宏观海洋区域。

Macro ocean regions currently accept pai.en: Macro ocean regions currently accept paint, eraser, and eyedropper actions.
Macro ocean regions currently accept pai.zh: 当前可对宏观海洋区域使用上色、橡皮和吸管操作。

Only show water regions that currently h.en: Only show water regions that currently have an explicit override.
Only show water regions that currently h.zh: 只显示当前存在显式 override 的水域。

When off, macro ocean regions can be ins.en: When off, macro ocean regions can be inspected but ignore paint, eraser, and eyedropper actions.
When off, macro ocean regions can be ins.zh: 关闭后，宏观海洋区域仍可查看，但会忽略上色、橡皮和吸管操作。

When off, macro ocean regions stay hidde.en: When off, macro ocean regions stay hidden from inspector selection and map picking.
When off, macro ocean regions stay hidde.zh: 关闭后，宏观海洋区域不会出现在检视器选择和地图拾取中。

Antarctica / Peninsula 80W-74W Overlap S.zh: 南极洲/半岛 80W-74W 重叠扇区

Ashmore and Cartier Islands.zh: 阿什莫尔和卡地亚群岛

Bosnia and Herzegovina.zh: 波斯尼亚和黑塞哥维那

Heard Island and McDonald Islands.zh: 赫德岛和麦克唐纳群岛

Saint Pierre and Miquelon.zh: 圣皮埃尔和密克隆群岛

id::AU__1.zh: 阿什莫尔和卡地亚群岛

id::BA.zh: 波斯尼亚和黑塞哥维那

id::HM.zh: 赫德岛和麦克唐纳群岛

id::PM.zh: 圣皮埃尔和密克隆群岛
